title: Update location address to Thuckalay, Kanyakumari District

requirements.text: Update the address displayed in the Location section (frontend/src/components/Location.tsx) to: Thuckalay, Kalkulam Taluk, Kanyakumari District, Tamil Nadu – 629175, India. Replace any existing placeholder or previously shown address text with this real address across all address display elements, info cards, and any embedded map popup labels within the Location section.

quotes:
Location is Thuckalay,
Kalkulam Taluk,
Kanyakumari District,
Tamil Nadu – 629175,
India

acceptanceCriteria: The Location section displays 'Thuckalay, Kalkulam Taluk, Kanyakumari District, Tamil Nadu – 629175, India' as the facility address.
No placeholder address text remains in the Location section.
The interactive map marker popup label also reflects the updated address or facility name with the correct location.
The Footer component, if it displays an address, is also updated to reflect Thuckalay, Kanyakumari District, Tamil Nadu – 629175, India.
The existing interactive map coordinates (8.120236, 77.454371), maritime theme styling, and info cards are preserved unchanged.

constraints: Do not change the interactive map coordinates (8.120236, 77.454371).
Do not alter the maritime navy/seafoam visual theme or layout of the Location section.
Do not modify any immutable frontend paths.
nonGoals: Changing map provider or map implementation.
Adding new sections or features beyond address text update.
Modifying contact phone numbers or email address.
